'''Battle Group Arcus''' was a unit of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the unit came to subjugate [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]] under the leadership of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].
